title: Salty Creamy Australian Tofu Bowl
description: A comforting, diabetic‑friendly bowl that blends silky tahini sauce, aromatic bhuna spices, and nutty sesame seeds for a quick, salty treat perfect for a sick day.

ingredients.name: Firm tofu
ingredients.notes: Press for 15 min, cut into 1-inch cubes

ingredients.name: Bhuna spice blend
ingredients.notes: Cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, turmeric, cayenne

instructions: Press tofu for 15 min and cut into 1‑inch cubes.
Whisk tahini, soy sauce, lemon juice, sweetener, ginger, garlic, and bhuna blend until smooth.
Heat sesame oil in a skillet over medium heat; add tofu cubes and cook until golden on all sides (about 4‑5 min).
Pour the sauce over tofu, stir to coat, and simmer for 2 min until heated through.
Sauté spinach in the skillet for 1 min until just wilted.
Assemble bowls: place cooked quinoa at the bottom, top with sautéed spinach, then the seasoned tofu.
Sprinkle crushed roasted almonds and chopped cilantro over each bowl; add a few extra sesame seeds if desired.
Serve warm, optionally with a squeeze of fresh lemon.
